holdings.infoBox: USRT is an equity ETF with a total of 130 individual holdings. The top holdings are Welltower stock at 7.88%, Prologis at 7.45%, Equinix at 6.46%, Simon Property Group at 4.52%, and Digital Realty Trust at 4.15%.

overview.description: The iShares Core U.S. REIT ETF (USRT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund tracks a diversified market-cap-weighted index of US-listed REITs. It excludes mortgage, timber and infrastructure REITs. USRT was launched on May 1, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.
